channel.title: Pages on Russell Rollins
channel.description: Recent content in Pages on Russell Rollins

item.title: About
item.description: Hello, you’ve found your way to my blog somehow or another. Glad to have yah. I’m a Software Engineer at Salesforce, working in the Pardot division here in Atlanta, GA. I write Go and PHP proficiently and I write Ruby, Bash, Java, and Javascript competently. I like solving problems, especially ones I didn’t think I knew how to solve. I want to learn more about Rust, gRPC, and how to write testable microservices.
